prompts.text: Hi Thumper! How are you today?
Remind me what you can help with.
Any tips for the trade board?
What kinds of listings do reps usually get traded fastest?
Tell me a quick fun fact about jewelry.
How do I know if a listing is performing well?
Is there a best time of day to refresh my board?
Can you explain how the board feels to a new rep?
Thanks — anything else I should be doing?
What should I say to a customer waiting on a trade?
Wrap up — summarize what we talked about.
Quick hello — I'll check back later.
Show me my trade board.
What's on my board right now?
List only available listings.
How many items do I have listed?
Show me my rings specifically.
Give me the summary of my board.
What's the total MSRP of what I'm offering?
Please remove listing RG31452, reason mistake.
I want to take down NK66139 — reason keeping.
